checks.name: results_null_location_id
checks.description: Cloud parse drops location_id; resolve.py backfills from event_location.

checks.name: split_names_same_geo
checks.description: Same raw event name + same geo must not map to multiple event_id.

checks.name: noncanonical_divisions
checks.description: Legacy plural division labels from old parser/registry.

checks.name: points_history_drift
checks.description: SCD2 open row must match core.dancer_points snapshot.

checks.name: orphan_event_id
checks.description: Every result event_id must exist in core.events.

checks.name: editions_null_location_id
checks.description: Event editions derive location from results mode location_id.

checks.name: all_caps_cities
checks.description: ALL CAPS city names (CHICAGO, TOULOUSE, WILMINGTON DEL).

checks.name: location_id_multiple_strings
checks.description: One location_id must not have conflicting event_location strings.

checks.name: city_equals_country
checks.description: city=country usually geocode bug; Singapore ids 159/244 whitelisted.
checks.fix_hint: LOCATION_ID_CORRECTIONS or city-state allowlist in quality_audit

checks.name: double_space_event_location
checks.description: Double spaces in location strings (Moscow,  Russia).

checks.name: catalog_duplicate_city_token
checks.description: Duplicated city in typical_location (Madrid, Madrid, Spain).
checks.fix_hint: Fix schedule enrich or sync from event_editions

checks.name: phantom_ids_not_merged
checks.description: Phantom registry ids must be merged/inactive (Swing&Snow, Grand Nationals).

checks.name: swing_snow_alias
checks.description: Swing&Snow spelling variant must alias to canonical event_id 215.

checks.name: catalog_with_editions_missing_typical_location
checks.description: Events with results must have typical_location in catalog.
